text:
When
find the
prime
factorisation of a r
number, we
first write
we
it as a p
product of t
two
factors. For
example, 72 = 12
2×6
6. Then, we
find the prime factorisation of each ofthe factors. In the above example,
12 =2 x 2× 3 and 6=2 x3. Now, can you say what the prime factorisation
of 72 is?
